query:
-- Current hot project contact coverage
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_send_ready = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot_with_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_send_ready = 0 AND has_any_contact = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot_no_send_ready_but_has_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_any_contact = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot_no_contacts_at_all,
  COUNT(*) as total_hot
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_send_ready,
    MAX(CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_any_contact
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.suppressed = 0
  GROUP BY p.id
) sub;

-- Current hot project contact coverage
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_send_ready = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot_with_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_send_ready = 0 AND has_any_contact = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot_no_send_ready_but_has_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_any_contact = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot_no_contacts_at_all,
  COUNT(*) as total_hot
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_send_ready,
    MAX(CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_any_contact
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND p.suppressed = 0
  GROUP BY p.id
) sub;
